scripts.dev:restart: npm run dev:stop && sleep 1 && npm run dev
scripts.build: npm run lint && npm run generate-sitemap && npx @tailwindcss/cli -i ./src/input.css -o ./public/css/tailwind.css --minify && tsc && rm -rf dist/views dist/locales dist/data dist/docs && cp -r src/views dist/ && cp -r src/locales dist/ && cp -r src/data dist/ && cp -r docs dist/docs
scripts.deploy: npm run build && pm2 restart kontraktor-prod && echo 'Deploy complete'
scripts.clean-db: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); ['/root/kontraktor/data/kontraktor.dev.db', '/root/kontraktor/data/kontraktor.prod.db', '/root/kontraktor/data/kontraktor.db'].forEach(f => { ['', '-shm', '-wal'].forEach(ext => { try { fs.unlinkSync(f + ext); } catch(e) {} }) })"
